name: Lieutenant Kess
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, scout lieutenant in wind, hills behind, tired eyes, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: They’re retreating like wounded wolves. Still dangerous. Still clever.

nodes.text:
Trail signs:

- A runner carrying signals to an underground hold.
- Wargs scouting the flanks.
- A disciplined captain trying to keep order without the standard.

If we catch the runner, we choose the next battlefield.
If we fail, they vanish into stone.

choices.label: Commit to hunting the runner first.
Commit to breaking the captain’s rearguard first.

name: Marta of the Ridge Farms
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, farm woman in cloak, windblown hair, bruised but resolute, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: They took my boy to haul timber. Said the ‘stone city’ below would pay for him.

nodes.text:
I saw them vanish into a crack in the hills.

Not a cave.

A doorway shaped like old teeth.

If you go… bring a lantern. The dark down there is greedy.
